name: empty_trash
description: Tool to permanently delete all of the user's trashed files. use when you want to empty the trash in google drive.

driveId.description:
If set, empties the trash of the provided shared drive. This parameter is ignored if the item is not in a shared drive.
Example: "0ABmN4q4aF7dPUk9PVA"

enforceSingleParent.description: Deprecated: If an item is not in a shared drive and its last parent is deleted but the item itself is not, the item will be placed under its owner's root. This parameter is ignored if the item is not in a shared drive.
